violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Close boxes/bags of food items in walk in freezer. Many left open.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizer concentration in wiping cloth bucket too strong. Maintain concentration levels at 300-500 ppm QA.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Multi-colored utensil storage containers in kitchen have food debris in them and need cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Dry storage/utility room has unfinished construction.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Hang or position mop in a manner that encourages proper air drying. Currently stored in mop sink.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Prep table cooler cutting board needs cleaning.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Multi-color utensil storage containers need cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Unfinished construction in storage room.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Kitchen delivery door not provided with self closing device.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Store glass cleaners/spray bottles off prep table coolers in kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
